pageContext.name: Be@rbrick Pushead #6 400%
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Medicom Toy are excited to present the Be@rbrick Pushead #6 400％ Collectible Figure!  Standing approximately 11.02 inches tall, this Be@rbrick features art by graphic artist Pushead.  Don't miss out on adding this to your Be@rbrick collection today!
